data/maps/MossdeepCity_StevensHouse/text.MossdeepCity_StevensHouse_Text_YouveEarn: STEVEN: {PLAYER}{KUN}?\pYes, this is my place. It's a little\nembarrassing how empty it is here.\pOh, here, you should take this HM.\pIt contains DIVE.\nI've already taught my POKéMON.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_StevensHouse/text.MossdeepCity_StevensHouse_Text_ExplainDi:
STEVEN: While you're using SURF, you
should notice dark patches of water.\pUse DIVE if you come to deep water
like it. You'll drop to the seafloor.\pWhen you want to come back up, use
DIVE again.\pIn some places, it won't be possible
for you to surface, though.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_StevensHouse/text.MossdeepCity_StevensHouse_Text_Underwate:
STEVEN: Apparently, there's an
underwater cavern between\lMOSSDEEP and SOOTOPOLIS.\pYou know, the one that CAPT. STERN
found in his submarine.\pAn underwater cavern...\pThere might be some rare stones down
there... I should go for a DIVE...
data/maps/MossdeepCity_StevensHouse/text.MossdeepCity_StevensHouse_Text_TakeBallC: {PLAYER} checked the POKé BALL.\pIt contained the POKéMON\nBELDUM.\pTake the POKé BALL?
data/maps/MossdeepCity_StevensHouse/text.MossdeepCity_StevensHouse_Text_NoSpaceFo: There is no space for another POKéMON.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_StevensHouse/text.MossdeepCity_StevensHouse_Text_LeftPokeB: {PLAYER} left the POKé BALL where\nit was.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_StevensHouse/text.MossdeepCity_StevensHouse_Text_LetterFro:
It's a letter.\p... ... ... ... ... ...\pTo {PLAYER}{KUN}...\pI've decided to do a little soul-
searching and train on the road.\pI don't plan to return home for some
time.\pI have a favor to ask of you.\pI want you to take the POKé BALL on
the desk.\pInside it is a BELDUM, my favorite
POKéMON.\pI'm counting on you.\pMay our paths cross some day.\pSTEVEN STONE

It's a letter.\p... ... ... ... ... ...\pTo {PLAYER}{KUN}...\pI've decided to do a little soul-
searching and train on the road.\pI don't plan to return home for some
time.\pI have a favor to ask of you.\pI want you to take the POKé BALL on
the desk.\pInside it is a BELDUM, my favorite
POKéMON.\pI'm counting on you.\pIf you'd like, you should also take
the HM DIVE.\pMay our paths cross some day.\pSTEVEN STONE
data/maps/MossdeepCity_StevensHouse/text.MossdeepCity_StevensHouse_Text_Collectio: It's a collection of rare rocks and\nstones assembled by STEVEN.
